creator: wtp@bsdguru.org
text:
net/samba3 port does not compile when databases/tdb port is installed

Fix: Here is a fix for Samba port with CONFLICTS



Greetings from Poland
--
Krzysztof Stryjek--441m21QNGoewNMDZVwXDnfvGoMFvj4QZIHTPc2gcY3efnnZg
Content-Type: text/plain; name="Makefile.patch"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="Makefile.patch"

--- Makefile.orig	Tue Oct 16 01:27:09 2007
+++ Makefile	Tue Oct 16 01:29:20 2007
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@
 MAINTAINER?=		timur@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT?=		A free SMB and CIFS client and server for UNIX
 
-CONFLICTS?=		ja-samba-2.* ja-samba-3.* samba-2.* sharity-light-1.*
+CONFLICTS?=		ja-samba-2.* ja-samba-3.* samba-2.* sharity-light-1.* tdb-1.*
 
 USE_ICONV=		yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
How-To-Repeat: 	First install databases/tdb then try to compile net/samba3. You will
receive errors about tdb_open_ex
